_comment: Selection chrome centres on the block's true footprint while a standing anchor offset holds it off the regiment point: a lone Spearmen regiment (drill mode, no opponent) is selected, then widened by dragging its EAST flank grip further east -- the anchored drag holds the WEST edge fixed, leaving the block standing east of `Unit.position`. The point under review is the chrome after the drag settles: the selection ring hugs the shifted block (not an inflated circle about the old centre), and both resize grips sit just past the block's actual edges instead of the anchored-side grip floating ~2x the offset out west. Driven live through the real SelectionManager by tools/demo/DemoInputRecorder.gd; world coordinates; physics ticks (60/s).
